flags_raised: Semantic divergence detected: Agent output only 35.5% aligned with expected compliance behavior
Behavioral drift detected: 44.0% deviation from historical baseline

root_cause_analysis.root_cause: The agent failed because it was not explicitly instructed to adherence to the $5,000 USD threshold for autonomous approvals as per policy rule R001.

remediation.corrected_system_prompt: Process this transaction, adhering to all applicable policy rules, including obtaining secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD.
remediation.constraint_added: Obtain secondary manager signature and explicit authorization code for expenditures exceeding $5,000 USD.
preventive_measures: Regularly review and update agent training data to reflect changing policy rules and business practices.
Implement real-time auditing and monitoring of agent decisions to detect and correct deviations from expected behavior.
Conduct periodic stress testing of the agent system to identify and address potential vulnerabilities and constraints gaps.

governance.next_step: Route to AI Governance Team for prompt review and approval before redeployment
governance.audit_trail: Full reasoning trace preserved in incident log
